market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Telecom giant KDDI to acquire 14.9% stake in Coincheck Group in $65 million deal
articles.description: The companies signed a business alliance for revenue sharing, referral fees and customer referrals to expand crypto access in Japan.

articles.title: Clarity Act amendments would remake key parts of crypto bill but have doubtful future
articles.description: The U.S. crypto market structure bill is being targeted with dozens of amendments aiming  to change or add to the text as its Senate hearing approaches.

articles.title: Animoca-backed NUVA connects Figure's $19 billion of tokenized assets to Ethereum
articles.description: The protocol, led by veteran BNY executive Anthony Moro, aims to connect real-world assets with DeFi markets, starting with home equity lines of credit and Treasuries.

articles.title: Brickken and Magma partner to deliver Net Asset Value (NAV) oracle for tokenized real estate
articles.description: Built on Magma's Digital Twin Token (DTT) and Brickken's institutional tokenization infrastructure to close the data gap that has held tokenized real estate back.

articles.title: Amazon launches an AI shopping assistant for the search bar, powered by Alexa+
articles.description: Alexa for Shopping is a new personalized AI shopping assistant in the Amazon search bar that replaces its Rufus assistant.

articles.title: Paybis secures MiCA, payment licenses in Latvia for EU crypto expansion
articles.description: Paybis has secured both a MiCA crypto licence and a PSD2 payment institution licence from Latvia’s central bank, becoming the first company in the country to hold both simultaneously.

articles.title: Anduril raises $5B, doubles valuation to $61B
articles.description: After achieving $2.2 billion in revenue in 2025, the defense tech startup has raised another massive round, led by Thrive and a16z, it says.

articles.title: Crypto wallet provider Ledger puts U.S. IPO plans on hold due to market conditions
articles.description: The French crypto security firm, which is said to have explored a potential $4 billion U.S. listing, is reassessing its public market plans as volatile conditions weigh on investor appetite for crypto IPOs.

articles.title: r/WallStreetBets really hates the SEC’s proposal to weaken quarterly reporting
articles.description: The retail trading subreddit submitted the sharpest criticism yet in response to the financial regulator's idea of letting companies report twice per year.

articles.title: It’s time for clarity for America’s digital asset markets
articles.description: Recent polls have shown that registered voters want America to set the rules for global finance, reinforcing why the Senate must act now, explains Smith.

articles.title: Anthropic now has more business customers than OpenAI, according to Ramp data
articles.description: For the first time, Anthropic has more verified business customers than OpenAI, according to this month’s AI Index from the fintech firm Ramp.

articles.title: Introducing the 6 stages at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 — built for today’s tougher startup market
articles.description: From October 13-15, TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 will feature 200+ sessions across six stages, led by 250+ tech leaders shaping the industry today. Register now to save up to $410, plus 50% off a second pass.

articles.title: WhatsApp adds an incognito mode in Meta AI chats
articles.description: Meta said these incognito conversations are not saved, and messages will disappear by default once you close the chat.

articles.title: 群聯 4 月份 EPS 達 34.56 元，累計前四個月 EPS 超過百元賺逾 10 個股本
articles.description: 記憶體大廠群聯電子依監管機構台北證券交易所的要求，於13日公布2026年4月自結財務報告，繳出極為亮眼的成績單 […]

articles.title: Farage faces UK standards probe over $7M gift from crypto billionaire
articles.description: UK Reform Party leader Nigel Farage is reportedly facing a probe over an undeclared donation from crypto billionaire Christopher Harborne that he received before becoming an MP in 2024.

articles.title: Poppy debuts a proactive AI assistant to help organize your digital life
articles.description: Poppy is an AI-powered app that connects your calendar, email, messages, and other services to surface reminders, suggestions, and tasks based on what’s happening in your life.

articles.title: Anthropic, OpenAI tokens plunge as AI firms say pre-IPO share transfers are invalid
articles.description: Tokens on Solana that claim to track the private-market valuations of Anthropic and OpenAI dropped sharply this week after both AI companies warned that the structures used to back the tokens may be invalid.

articles.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: SUI drops 3.2% as index trades lower
articles.description: Bittensor (TAO), down 2.7% from Tuesday, joined Sui (SUI) as an underperformer.

articles.title: Live markets: Bitcoin dips below $80,000 as producer price inflation surges to 6%
articles.description: U.S. PPI surged well above forecasts in April, reviving concerns that rising oil prices and Iran-related supply risks may feed another inflation wave.

articles.title: Metaplanet Q1 profit jumps, but Bitcoin losses hit bottom line
articles.description: Metaplanet posted strong Q1 operating income driven by Bitcoin options revenue, but swung to a $728 million loss as BTC price declines triggered valuation markdowns.
